allow: PowerShell($url = "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/com/sun/activation/jakarta.activation/2.0.1/jakarta.activation-2.0.1.jar"; $dest = "web\\WEB-INF\\lib\\jakarta.activation-2.0.1.jar"; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; if \($?\) { Write-Output "Downloaded successfully"; \(Get-Item $dest\).Length } else { Write-Output "Download failed" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $jar = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("web/WEB-INF/lib/jakarta.activation-2.0.1.jar"\); $entry = $jar.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "com/sun/activation/registries/LogSupport.class" }; if \($entry\) { Write-Output "FOUND: com.sun.activation.registries.LogSupport.class" } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" }; $jar.Dispose\(\))
Bash(ls "C:/Program Files/Apache Software Foundation/Tomcat 10.1/lib/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i servlet)
